creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Terry Kennedy from comment #21)

Beyond indicating that "4 years" was not required and
what you referenced as the source of that figure does
not apply of itself, I made no attempt to indicate
when things would or should happen.

It is just a less constrained context with more options
(both for shorter, similar, or longer periods) and less
policy.

I posted a note to freebsd-ports showing the commit to
the handbook for broader awareness. That may contribute
to feedback that helps set the actual time frame.
